description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'HL7_Enricher' to enrich HL7 v2.x messages received on TCP port 6661 (MLLP). The channel must extract the Patient MRN from PID-3.1, look up the corresponding email address in the 'patient_contacts' table of the PostgreSQL database (jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb; user: postgres; password: postgres), and insert that email into PID-13.4. Enriched messages should be written to /home/ga/enriched_output/. Configuration can be performed via the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api or using the provided Terminal and Firefox.
